$schema: Manifest of CorvusDevs apps. Each project's docs/index.html carousel fetches this and renders all entries except its own (matched on slug). Adding a new app here makes it appear automatically across every project's page on next page load. Keep keys stable, they're consumed by the cross-promo carousel + automated README renderers.

apps.name: Alien Crow
apps.description: Supercharge old.reddit.com and modern Reddit with 90+ tools: dark mode and 20+ themes, ad and nag blocking, comment upgrades, media tools, and keyboard navigation. Works on macOS, iOS, and iPadOS.

apps.name: Findbar
apps.description: Type a keyword in Safari's address bar and jump anywhere. 30+ built-in shortcuts, edit any of them or add your own. Works on macOS, iOS, and iPadOS.

apps.name: Corvus Player
apps.description: The most powerful and customizable media player for macOS. Built on mpv with GPU-accelerated playback, real-time GLSL shaders, streaming, and 200+ settings.

apps.name: Corvus RSS Reader
apps.description: Subscribe to feeds, YouTube channels, and blogs in one place. Works on macOS, iOS, and iPadOS.

apps.name: Ekual
apps.description: Automatic loudness equalization for macOS. Balances volume across all your apps in real time. Free 14-day trial.

apps.name: Purple Crow for Safari
apps.description: BTTV, FFZ, and 7TV emotes plus 50+ features. Auto-claim, split chat, PiP, anonymous viewing, and more.

apps.name: Auto Mute Tab for Safari
apps.description: Automatically mutes background tabs so only the focused tab plays audio. PiP, keyboard shortcuts, and domain whitelist.

apps.name: Red Crow for Safari
apps.description: Speed control, SponsorBlock, video filters, and 40+ features for YouTube. Native Safari extension for iPhone and iPad. macOS coming soon.

apps.name: Tekla
apps.description: Swipe-to-type virtual keyboard for macOS. Smart predictions, 14 languages, full desktop layout, 100% offline.
